note: Curated reference images for Claude's vision input. PRIMARILY pulled from Juan Diego's 70-slide master template at private/reference-decks/30x-master-template/ — that's the canonical 30x design language as of April 2026. Each entry points to a real 30x slide that exemplifies a layout pattern. When generating, we pass 5–8 of these to Claude so it sees the visual language of a real 30x deck, not just text instructions.

references.note: THE recognition cover — Aeroméxico × 30X by Andrés Bilbao. Partner logo top-left + 30X top-right + headline with lime accent + 2 body paragraphs over dark airline photo. This is the canonical pattern for corporate proposals.

Hero cover dark mode — big bold headline with lime accent line, partner logo lockup with 30X bottom-left, dotted world map background. Used when a single concept (e.g., 'AI-Ready Leadership') is the entire pitch.
Light mode bento layout — big headline + paragraph left, 3 stacked stat cards right (gray, gray, lime). Lime is reserved for the destacado / future card.
Mentor spotlight 50/50 — left: eyebrow + title + paragraph + 5 bullets with lime icons. Right: large mentor portrait with name + role caption.

Mentor + audience data hybrid — left: portrait of the speaker + audience metrics (followers, gender split with donut). Right: city map + age bars + country breakdown. Demonstrates 30x data-viz with lime accent in donuts/bars.
Mentor duo grid in light mode — 2 mentor cards side by side with photo, name, role, company, 4 capability columns below. Pattern for showing decision-makers + skill matrix together.
Headline + 2 mentor cards + 4 capability columns — same pattern in dark mode. Title-with-lime-pause-word pattern: '...para Equipos de Growth en Hipercrecimiento.'
Single mentor full-bleed photo left + bio right with lime eyebrow ('CHARLA · EN VIVO') + name + paragraph + 3 bullets. Speaker slide pattern.
Workshop pillar slide — left: lime-accented headline + paragraph. Right: secondary headline + 4-bullet checklist. Two-column dense content pattern.
Hero statement with lime-accented phrase over partner photo — 'Convertir una decisión estratégica en CAPACIDAD ORGANIZACIONAL.' Dark overlay + partner logo top-right. Dramatic transition slide.

Pricing dark — left: headline + 'lo que recibirás' bullet list + big lime price. Right: data sidebar (duración / sesiones / modalidad / acceso / personas) + contact card. Canonical pricing-cta layout.
Testimonials — left: 'Lo que dicen los founders' eyebrow + big headline. Right: 3 quote blocks each with quote + name + lime company name. Use for social proof slides.
Rate card with mentor portrait — left: 4 pricing rows (Instagram, Reel, Reel Collab) with lime price headers. Right: large B&W mentor portrait. Speaker rate sheet pattern.
